items.title: Hijra & Transgender Studies

items.body: Health discourse, care, and the governance of bodies in South Asian contexts.

items.title: Climate & Coastal Lives
items.body: Reproductive health and resilience among women in salinity-stressed coastal Bangladesh.

items.title: Post-Truth Media
items.body: Truth, rumour, and broadcast across the border in a fractured media landscape.

items.title: Urban Anthropology
items.body: City life, class, and the making of the middle-class self in Dhaka.

items.title: Sexual & Reproductive Health
items.body: Rights, access, and silence around SRH for women and gender-diverse people.
